sentence: As part of the Quantum Pioneers Program, the (<https://pawsey.org.au/>)Pawsey (<https://pawsey.org.au/>)Supercomputing Research Centre partnered with (<https://quantumbrilliance.com/>)Quantum Brilliance to enable industry and research teams to explore the possibilities of edge quantum computing.
Currently, the BQA is in discussion with other federal institutions such as PTB or BAM.

doc_id: GER_2018_Quantum technologies – from basic research to market
sentence: The key actors currently working on topics related to quantum technologies are the German Aerospace Center (DLR), the Jülich Research Centre (FZJ), the Helmholtz Centre in Berlin (HZB), the Helmholtz Centre in Dresden-Rossendorf (HZDR) and the Karlsruhe Institute for Technology (KIT).

doc_id: GER_2018_Quantum technologies – from basic research to market
sentence: The central initiative for exploiting quantum sensors takes the form of a focus project involving the three Freiburg institutes, IAF, IPM and IWM.

This project brings together researchers from the Republic of Ireland (SFI Research Centres CONNECT and IPIC), Northern Ireland (Queen’s University Belfast) and the USA (National Science Foundation Engineering Research Center for Quantum Networks), to investigate technologies that will form the building blocks of a quantum internet.

entities.entity: national science foundation engineering research center for quantum networks

sentence: And the rewards have been considerable, with the Amsterdam Internet Exchange (AMS-IX) now one of the world's biggest internet hubs, major data centres coming to the country and the emergence of Dutch-based global players such as Adyen Payments and Booking.com.

doc_id: JPN_2024_Promotion Measures for the Development of Quantum Industries
sentence: - ✓ In Japan, starting with the public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer, "Eri," at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology) in March 2023, domestic companies and the Quantum Software Research Center (Osaka University) have also developed and unveiled domestic machines utilizing RIKEN's technology.
